message:
docs(tui): add drain/enable shortcuts to help overlay

Document the 'd' (drain worker) and 'e' (enable worker) keyboard
shortcuts in the TUI help overlay. These actions were already
implemented but not documented in the help text.

Also increased help overlay height from 18 to 20 lines to accommodate
the additional content.

Fixes: bd-1olr, bd-r7l7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
